title: Deeper and Slimier
description: A Splendid Slimes addon that adds a Deeper and Darker inpired slime
body:
This **[Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes)** addon adds a **Sculk Slime** for the **(Deeper and Darker}(https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)** mod!

# Sculk Slime:
**Diet:** Loves to eat Soul Dust, but also likes Bloom Berries and most of the types of sculk blocks

**Behavior:**
- Since they can't see, Sculk Slimes are very sensitive and gets happier and sad twice as fast
- When turned into a Largo, they get very picky, and will get mad if they eat from the same diet twice in a row
- They give the Night Vision effect to those around them when happy, but everything will go dark if they get mad
- They don't activate sculk sensors

**Plorts:** Their Plort can turn into Echo Shards, Sculk Bones, Resonarium, sould Crystal or, if you are VERY lucky, they have 0.1% chance of turning into a Warden Carapace

**How to get:** You can get Sculk Slime Hearts in ancient cities, but they are more common on Deeper and Darker Ancient Temples

![An image of the Sculk Slime](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/287746e2a7af2361e1a38706379f1061cf35b8a8_0.webp)

### Dependencies:
To use this addon, you'll need to have [Splendid Slimes](https://modrinth.com/mod/splendid-slimes) and (Deeper and Darker}(https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) installed (obviously).

### Support:
If you have any suggestions or need any support with the addon, you can leave a comment or contact me directly through [my Discord](https://discord.com/users/lucasflin)! :D
